name: Real Keycloak login callback through platform-api session boundary

flow.loginPath: GET /auth/login → PKCE state in Redis → 302 → Keycloak /authorize
flow.callbackPath: GET /auth/callback → state validated → code exchanged → /userinfo → identity resolved → Redis session → HTTP-only cookie → 302 → React app
flow.sessionPath: GET /api/session → fixture (priority) or Redis cookie → safe SessionActor JSON
flow.logoutPath: POST /auth/logout → Redis session destroyed → cookie cleared (Max-Age=0)

securityDecisions.noJwtVerification: userinfo trusted by provenance (server-to-server confidential client exchange)

fixtureSessionPreservation.LOCAL_FIXTURE_SESSION: Takes precedence over real cookie in both /api/session and pipeline auth resolution

deferrals: Keycloak global logout (end_session) — cookie cleared, full SSO logout is a follow-up
Full E2E with real Keycloak — requires live Keycloak + KEYCLOAK_CLIENT_SECRET env var
Staging/production Keycloak provisioning — blocked until AWS infra
envVars: SESSION_COOKIE_SECURE (default: false; set true in production)
